name: com.unity.services.multiplayer

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed
- Fixed an issue where using an invalid `RelayProtocol` in `SessionOptions.WithNetworkOptions()` would try to connect with the wrong protocol.

description: The Multiplayer Services package is a one-stop solution for adding multiplayer elements to a game developed in Unity. The Unity Gaming Services (UGS) Multiplayer services powers these capabilities to define how groups of players interact in your games.
